category: Woodwind and String Instruments of an Orchestra
explanation: Violin, Flute, Clarinet, and Oboe are all instruments commonly found in an orchestra. A Conductor leads the orchestra but is not an instrument.

category: Historical Absolute Units of Physical Measurement
explanation: Fathom, League, Mite, and Rod are all traditional or historical units used to measure absolute physical quantities such as depth, distance, length, or weight. Decibel is a modern, logarithmic unit used to express the ratio of two values of intensity or power.
Mark, Lira, Yen, and Rupee are or were all names of primary national currencies. A Penny is a subdivision of a larger currency unit, not a standalone national currency.
